error_signature: new document created instead of updating existing document
title: Firestore node creates new document instead of updating
symptom: When attempting to update a Firestore document using the Firestore 'Create or Update' operation, a new document is created instead of updating the existing one.
applies_when: Document ID is provided in the input
not_this_if: Document ID is not correctly mapped
root_cause: The Firestore node requires the correct Document ID to be specified in the input data. If the Document ID is not correctly referenced, it defaults to creating a new document instead of updating the existing one.
fix_steps: Ensure the Document ID is included in the input data
Use the correct key from the input data (e.g., '_id') for the update operation
Test the workflow to confirm the document updates correctly
agent_instruction: Map the Document ID correctly in the Firestore node input to ensure it updates the existing document.
